name: GOLFTEC Burlington
about: GOLFTEC is a high-tech golf training studio focused on data-driven instruction and club fitting. Their facilities utilize advanced technology, including OPTIMOTION motion measurement, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors, to provide detailed swing feedback and personalized coaching. Lessons are tailored to individual goals, whether for beginners or experienced players, with a focus on structured improvement plans. The service model also includes custom club fitting, aiming to optimize equipment performance for each golfer's swing mechanics.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven lessons using OPTIMOTION and launch monitor technology
Personalized game plans and structured improvement strategies
Custom club fittings with shaft optimization and advanced launch monitors
Access to practice bays with launch monitors and video feedback
10% discount on pro shop gear for members

simulator_hardware.notes: Mentioned as a product sold and used for launch monitoring

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs, or GOLFTEC provides equipment for lessons and fittings. Custom club fittings use their technology to match you with optimal clubs from brands like Callaway, TaylorMade, and PING.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service at GOLFTEC locations, so outside food and drinks are not specified. It is recommended to check with the specific location for their policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC focuses on lessons, practice, and club fitting rather than simulator play. They do not advertise simulator time for playing full 18-hole rounds.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers junior programs and mentions 'juniors_youth' in its target audience, indicating they cater to young golfers with age-appropriate coaching and technology.
